summary:
The optimal study design involves conducting a longitudinal cohort study that tracks fat content in breast milk from birth through different development phases for both premature and full-term babies, ensuring accurate comparisons by directly observing these changes prospectively rather than using potentially biased historical or mixed-methods approaches.
The chosen method allows continuous monitoring which enhances reliability when assessing nutritional outcomes specific to infant maturity levels during lactation. ```

The chosen method allows continuous monitoring which enhances reliability when assessing nutritional outcomes specific to infant maturity levels during lactation. ```. Answer choice: C
